data.description: 3 cards: 1981 Fleer and two 1991 Topps. Small lot targeting active Rickey Henderson collectors.

data.notes: 1981 Fleer is the anchor — semi-rookie, raw ~7 grade. The 1991 Topps are filler but round out the lot.
1981 Fleer anchors at ~$4-5 raw; raw ~7 condition justifies modest premium. 1991 Topps add minimal value.

data.title: Rickey Henderson 3-Card Lot 1981 Fleer 1991 Topps Raw HOF Oakland A's
data.description:
Small Rickey Henderson lot anchored by his 1981 Fleer card — not the rookie but the next best thing for Rickey collectors. The card presents nicely, raw grade in the 7 range. Rounded out with two 1991 Topps for the completists.

Cards | 3 total
Years | 1981, 1991
Brands | Fleer (x1), Topps (x2)
Condition | 1981 Fleer raw ~7; 1991 Topps Very Good
Player | Rickey Henderson, Oakland A's / New York Yankees

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: 3 cards total. 1981 Fleer Rickey Henderson — raw, presents at approximately a 7 grade, solid corners, good centering. Two 1991 Topps Rickey Henderson in Very Good condition. No creases or major flaws noted.
